values.universe.derelict-extant-part-1.title: Derelict Extant
values.universe.derelict-extant-part-1.descript: A survival-horror mystery aboard a ruined vessel.
values.location.cryopod.title: Cryopod
values.location.cryopod.description: Darkness presses against the narrow pressure shell.
values.action.open-your-eyes.title: Open Your Eyes
values.action.open-your-eyes.description: Force your eyes open against the cold.
values.action.open-your-eyes.success: Frost webs the pod window inches from your face. A damaged status lamp pulses beyond it, and the machinery beneath you misses every third beat.
values.action.open-your-eyes.failure: Your eyelids lift briefly. Cold and darkness close over the glimpse.

privateNotes: Corrected the rejected manifest and starting-location shapes while preserving the focused opening action.
